name: @forgeax/engine-gltf
description: Runtime glTF 2.0 importer (Tier-B subset: scenes + nodes + meshes (POSITION + INDICES) + UnlitMaterial.baseColor + Camera.perspective). Pure-function pipeline parseGlb / parseGltf / toAssetPack consumed by build-time CLI (forgeax-engine-console-gltf import) writing <source>.meta.json (external-asset-package; assetType=gltf) for runtime loadByGuid<SceneAsset>.

fps.reason: build-time importer pure-function pipeline; no runtime canvas. fps reported by hello-gltf app (M5).

bench.reason: Tier-B importer is one-shot build-time work (not a hot path); bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math.

gate.reason: no per-package binary gate; runtime parsing is consumed by @forgeax/engine-runtime + cli-gltf only, no separate enforcement scope.
